questions.question: What must happen before the day of the Lord comes?
options: The rebellion and the man of lawlessness must be revealed
All nations must hear the gospel
questions.correct: The rebellion and the man of lawlessness must be revealed
questions.feedback: The day will not come unless the rebellion comes first and the man of lawlessness is revealed.

questions.question: Where does the man of lawlessness take his seat?
questions.feedback: He takes his seat in the temple of God, proclaiming himself to be God.

questions.question: Paul says the mystery of lawlessness is already at work.
questions.feedback: The mystery of lawlessness is already at work, though restrained for now.

questions.question: God sends a strong _____ so that those who refused the truth will believe what is false.
questions.feedback: God sends them a strong delusion so they believe what is false.

questions.question: Paul tells the Thessalonians to stand firm and hold to the _____ they were taught.
questions.feedback: Stand firm and hold to the traditions taught by Paul.
